device_template.name: Zigbee sensor (zigbee2mqtt)
device_template.author: built-in
device_template.description: A Zigbee sensor bridged by zigbee2mqtt (Sonoff SNZB, Aqara, Tuya, Xiaomi…). Set the device connection topic to zigbee2mqtt/<friendly_name> — z2m publishes one JSON payload there and every row below reads a field from it (standard z2m exposes; field names per zigbee2mqtt.io). Rows are editable: remove what your sensor lacks, add plug fields (power/current/energy/state) or occupancy/contact for other device classes.

normal.description: MQTT input is push-driven; Zigbee sensors report on change / periodically

registers.name: pressure
registers.label: Pressure
registers.description: z2m expose 'pressure' (hPa) — only on sensors that have it

registers.name: voltage
registers.label: Battery voltage
registers.description: z2m expose 'voltage' — battery devices report millivolts
